title: Dave Meltzer On WBD Sale: 'They're Not Gonna Put AEW On Netflix'
summary: Following the revised all-cash offer from Netflix to purchase Warner Brothers, Dave Meltzer believes that AEW will not be on Netflix when the sale is closed.
